channel.title: Morse on giordii
channel.description: Recent content in Morse on giordii

item.title: Dashed — Six-Layer Encoding Chain: Morse → Hex → Binary → Base64 → Caesar
item.description: Decode a Morse code file, strip hex prefixes, convert to binary, interpret as Base64, then apply a Caesar shift derived from the first character — five transforms chained together.

item.title: Suoni Misteriosi — Morse Audio Decoder
item.description: A WAV file carries the flag in Morse code audio. Decode it automatically with morse-audio-decoder and wrap the result in flag{…}.
